recommendations.title: Tokyo Fiancée
recommendations.overview: A Japanophile young Belgian woman in Tokyo falls into a whirlwind romance with a Francophile Japanese student, in this charming and tender tale of young love and cultural discovery.

recommendations.title: The Marquez-Castillo Siblings
recommendations.overview: A group of four siblings compete for the heritage of their father.

recommendations.title: Playing It Cool
recommendations.overview: A young man meets and instantly falls in love with an engaged woman.

recommendations.title: Mamma Mia!
recommendations.overview: A spirited young bride-to-be living with her single mother on a small Greek island secretly invites three of her mother's ex-boyfriends in hope of finding her biological father to walk her down the aisle.

recommendations.title: Silent Light
recommendations.overview: Johan and his family are Mennonites from the north of Mexico. Against the law of God and Man, Johan falls in love with another woman.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Captain Corelli's Mandolin
recommendations.overview: When a fisherman leaves to fight with the Greek army during World War II, his fiancée falls in love with the local Italian commander.

recommendations.title: Who's That Knocking at My Door
recommendations.overview: A Catholic New Yorker falls in love with a girl and wants to marry her, but he struggles to accept her past and what it means for their future.

recommendations.title: Griffin & Phoenix
recommendations.overview: A terminally ill man falls in love with a woman who has a secret that threatens their time spent together.

recommendations.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
recommendations.overview: A lonely 40-ish man, likely to remain a bachelor, has a chance to find the love of his life when he falls for a vivacious young woman.
